outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday due to positive 0DTE GEX; high risk of volatility expansion on weekly/monthly timeframes.
outlook.summary: Market is balanced exactly on the 0DTE Gamma Flip (659.2). While 0DTE shows positive GEX (dealer long gamma) suggesting price pinning and stability, the Weekly and Monthly expiries exhibit significant negative GEX (-4.2B combined) and heavy put skew. This divergence creates a fragile equilibrium: expect tight ranges intraday with a strong magnetic pull toward Max Pain (657), but be alert for violent moves if the 650 structural support breaks.

levels.motivazione: Spot price is exactly aligned with the 0DTE Gamma Flip. This acts as the primary pivot determining dealer hedging behavior (long vs short gamma).
Significant Put Open Interest across all expiries (9.8k 0DTE, 23k Weekly, 72k Monthly). This is the critical structural support level for the entire complex.
0DTE Max Pain level. With positive GEX, dealers will likely suppress volatility and pin price toward this level to expire options worthless.
Dominant Call Open Interest in 0DTE (20,777 OI). Primary resistance for the day. Dealers will sell calls here to cap rallies.
High volume friction zone (261k Vol 0DTE) and significant Call OI. Immediate resistance above spot causing chop.

Major PUT WALL: WEEKLY 17,157 OI + MONTHLY 44,631 OI. Deep support zone for institutional hedging.

outlook.summary: Bearish regime with high PCR (1.43-3.15) and smirk skew (1.71) across all expiries. Spot above 0DTE gamma flip indicates short-term stability, but negative monthly GEX signals volatility risk ahead. Max pain at 6585 creates downward magnetic attraction. Structural support at 6400, layered resistance 6700-6800.

levels.motivazione: Tri-expiry structural support: 0DTE (5963 OI), WEEKLY (9120 OI), MONTHLY (25753 OI). Highest PUT concentration marks critical MM defense zone. Negative monthly GEX amplifies significance.
Dominant CALL wall across all expiries: 0DTE (10658 OI), WEEKLY (9010 OI), MONTHLY (4816 OI). Major resistance where dealers hedge short calls, capping upside.
0DTE gamma inflection 14 points below spot. Positive GEX zone (19.28B) suppresses volatility above. Critical pivot for intraday directional bias.
0DTE max pain 0.94% below spot. MM target zone with strong magnetic pull. WEEKLY max pain at 6580 reinforces attraction.
Strong 0DTE CALL resistance with 10688 OI, 21979 volume. Second highest CALL concentration. Immediate ceiling with dealer delta hedging overhead.
Exceptional volume cluster: 145903 CALL vol + 19521 PUT vol in 0DTE. Just below spot, creating intense friction zone with dealer rebalancing.
MONTHLY PUT support with 21906 OI. Second highest monthly PUT concentration. Deep support with extreme PCR (3.15) validating bearish sentiment exhaustion zone.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Positive GEX (3.09B) suppresses volatility. Spot pinned at gamma flip creates directional trigger. Bearish skew (1.63-1.85) and max pain below suggest downside bias if momentum breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot testing critical gamma flip at 24320. Positive total GEX stabilizes market but elevated PCR (1.34) and smirk skew indicate fear premium. Max Pain at 24090 creates magnetic pull below. Key decision: hold above 24320 for bullish continuation or drift toward 24090-24100 magnet zone. Massive 24100 call OI (4033) anchors structure.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE gamma equilibrium point virtually at spot. Critical threshold where dealer hedging shifts direction. High probability directional trigger - break above confirms bullish, break below triggers magnetic pull.
levels.sintesiOperativa: GAMMA FLIP: Critical trigger at spot

levels.motivazione: MONTHLY dominant OI (4033 calls) - massive concentration 0.9% below spot. ITM call anchor creates strong magnetic pull and dealer delta hedging pressure. Structural magnet zone.
0DTE max pain 0.96% below spot. Mathematical MM target zone where option value minimized. Reinforced by 24100 call OI proximity. Active magnetic attraction.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE PUT OI 379 + MONTHLY PUT OI 259. Deep structural support (3.4% below). Bearish skew (1.69-1.85) reinforces put wall strength. Crisis floor level.
0DTE near-spot CALL OI 196. Immediate resistance 7 pts above spot. First hurdle for bullish continuation. High VOL (132) confirms active interest.
CONFLUENCE: WEEKLY CALL OI 211 + MONTHLY CALL OI 86. Multi-expiry resistance 0.3% above spot. Breakout confirmation level.
MONTHLY PUT OI 506. Key monthly support 1.3% below spot. Aligns with max pain zone creating reinforced support confluence. Bearish skew validates strength.
